---
title: "Making of a Missionary, or, Daydreams in Earnest, The By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of ‘The Herd Boy and his Hermit’ ‘The Patriots of Palestine’ etc."
---

## Making of a Missionary, or, Daydreams in Earnest, The By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of ‘The Herd Boy and his Hermit’ ‘The Patriots of Palestine’ etc.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** n.d. [October 1900]
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** National Society’s Depository, Broad Sanctuary, Westminster, New York: Thomas Whittaker, 2 & 3 Bible House.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
